mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity_campaigns (title, description, reward_type, coin_amount, coupon_type, coupon_name, discount_rate, threshold_amount, reduce_amount, start_at, end_at, quota_limit, coupon_quantity, coupon_expiry_days, claimed_count, status, flash_sale) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{rewardType}, #{coinAmount}, #{couponType}, #{couponName}, #{discountRate}, #{thresholdAmount}, #{reduceAmount}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{quotaLimit}, #{couponQuantity}, #{couponExpiryDays}, #{claimedCount}, #{status}, #{flashSale})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity_campaigns ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT c.*, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM activity_claims ac WHERE ac.campaign_id = c.id AND ac.user_id = #{userId} ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS claimedByUser, CASE WHEN c.quota_limit IS NULL OR c.quota_limit = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GREATEST(c.quota_limit - c.claimed_count, 0) END AS remainingQuota, CASE WHEN c.status = 'ACTIVE' AND (c.start_at IS NULL OR c.start_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (c.end_at IS NULL OR c.end_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (c.quota_limit IS NULL OR c.quota_limit = 0 OR c.claimed_count < c.quota_limit) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM activity_claims ac WHERE ac.campaign_id = c.id AND ac.user_id = #{userId} ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS claimableNow FROM activity_campaigns c WHERE c.status <> 'ARCHIVED' ORDER BY c.flash_sale DESC, c.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE activity_campaigns SET claimed_count = claimed_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND (quota_limit IS NULL OR quota_limit = 0 OR claimed_count < quota_limit) AND (start_at IS NULL OR start_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (end_at IS NULL OR end_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
UPDATE activity_campaigns SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
